revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{asbox | image = Geographylogo.svg | pix = 30 | subject = | qualifier = about a [[geography|geographical location]] | category = Geography stubs | tempsort = * | name = Template:Geo-stub }}<noinclude> [[Category:Geography stub templates|*Geography]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Geo-stub here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
